message:
feat(tools): add pool utilization to health_check + core metrics resource

Extend health_check response with PoolUtilizationResponse showing
active/idle/total/pending connections, peak active, utilization %,
acquire latency percentiles (p50/p95/p99 in ms), over-80-for duration,
and warning flag (true when over 80% for >= 300s). Add
resource://tooling/metrics_core endpoint exposing the full
GlobalMetricsSnapshot (HTTP, DB, Storage, Tools metrics). Update
conformance fixture to match the new response shape with dynamic
latency fields in ignore_json_pointers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
